title: **Tone:** Even-keel, wry humor, practical but myth-curious
content:
**Tone:** Even-keel, wry humor, practical but myth-curious
**Known Attributes:**

* Naturally systems-minded (poker = algorithm in flesh)
* Clear communicator
* Trusted, but keeps emotional distance until invited deeper
* Pattern-seeker, grounded in “what works,” not “what if”
* Enjoys absurdity in moderation

* * *

🧠 FRIENDSHIP ENGINE LOGIC (FOR FUTURE REFINEMENT)
--------------------------------------------------

* **Style of invite:** Rational framing first, then pull him in with _stakes_ ("why it matters")
* **Tone-match:** Deadpan + insight
* **What Forrest needs to hear to engage:**
* "This isn't just an idea, it's already in motion."
context: From document: # Character Engine POV Critique — chunk 3 (chunk 3/206)
